name: Juice Shop — zip-slip path traversal on extracted archive entry

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Arbitrary File Write.

notes: Each extracted entry path is written to 'uploads/complaints/' + fileName, guarded only by absolutePath.includes(path.resolve('.')) — which a '../' entry still satisfies, allowing zip-slip writes outside the upload dir. Fix rejects entries whose resolved path does not start with the intended uploads/complaints/ directory.
